# Image Expansion

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/imageExpand`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/imageExpand/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-XCv4e_4v.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-image-expand`
- `query-image-expand-single`
- `query-image-expand-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/images/editing/expand`
- `/v1/images/editing/expand/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Image Expansion",zh:"扩图"},endpoints:[{id:"create-image-expand",method:"POST",path:"/v1/images/editing/expand",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Expand the image in any direction based on the original image.",zh:"基于原始图像向任意方向扩展图像。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Reference Image",zh:"参考图片"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image input as either Base64-encoded string or URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- **正确的 Base64 编码参数：**\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Image file size must not exceed 10MB. Image dimensions must be at least 300px in width and height, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比要在 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]},{name:"up_expansion_ratio",type:"float",required:!0,description:{en:"Expand upwards range; calculated based on multiples of the original image height",zh:"向上扩充范围；基于原图高度的倍数而计算"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 2]. The total area of the new image must not exceed 3 times that of the original image",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 2]，新图片整体面积不得超过原图片 3 倍"},{en:"- Example: If original height is 20 and value is 0.1, then:\n  - The distance from the top edge of the original image to the top edge of the new image is 20 × 0.1 = 2, and the area within is the expansion range",zh:"- 如原图高 20，当前参数值为 0.1，则：\n  - 原图顶边距离新图顶边为 20 × 0.1 = 2，区域内均为扩图范围"}]},{name:"down_expansion_ratio",type:"float",required:!0,description:{en:"Expand downwards range; calculated based on multiples of the original image height",zh:"向下扩充范围；基于原图高度的倍数而计算"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 2]. The total area of the new image must not exceed 3 times that of the original image",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 2]，新图片整体面积不得超过原图片 3 倍"},{en:"- Example: If original height is 20 and value is 0.2, then:\n  - The distance from the bottom edge of the original image to the bottom edge of the new image is 20 × 0.2 = 4, and the area within is the expansion range",zh:"- 如原图高 20，当前参数值为 0.2，则：\n  - 原图底边距离新图底边为 20 × 0.2 = 4，区域内均为扩图范围"}]},{name:"left_expansion_ratio",type:"float",required:!0,description:{en:"Expand leftwards range; calculated based on multiples of the original image width",zh:"向左扩充范围；基于原图宽度的倍数而计算"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 2]. The total area of the new image must not exceed 3 times that of the original image",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 2]，新图片整体面积不得超过原图片 3 倍"},{en:"- Example: If original width is 30 and value is 0.3, then:\n  - The distance from the left edge of the original image to the left edge of the new image is 30 × 0.3 = 9, and the area within is the expansion range",zh:"- 如原图宽 30，当前参数值为 0.3，则：\n  - 原图左边距离新图左边为 30 × 0.3 = 9，区域内均为扩图范围"}]},{name:"right_expansion_ratio",type:"float",required:!0,description:{en:"Expand rightwards range; calculated based on multiples of the original image width",zh:"向右扩充范围；基于原图宽度的倍数而计算"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 2]. The total area of the new image must not exceed 3 times that of the original image",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 2]，新图片整体面积不得超过原图片 3 倍"},{en:"- Example: If original width is 30 and value is 0.4, then:\n  - The distance from the right edge of the original image to the right edge of the new image is 30 × 0.4 = 12, and the area within is the expansion range",zh:"- 如原图宽 30，当前参数值为 0.4，则：\n  - 原图右边距离新图右边为 30 × 0.4 = 12，区域内均为扩图范围"}]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Positive text prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"n",type:"int",required:!1,default:"1",description:{en:"Number of generated images",zh:"生成图片数量"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [1, 9]",zh:"- 取值范围：[1, 9]"}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知。"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback
```
